rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

formulas.kum2: nakit1 / Math.pow(1 + iskonto / 100, 1) + nakit2 / Math.pow(1 + iskonto / 100, 2)
formulas.kum3: nakit1 / Math.pow(1 + iskonto / 100, 1) + nakit2 / Math.pow(1 + iskonto / 100, 2) + nakit3 / Math.pow(1 + iskonto / 100, 3)
formulas.result: investment > 0 ? (nakit1 / Math.pow(1 + iskonto/100, 1) + nakit2 / Math.pow(1 + iskonto/100, 2) + nakit3 / Math.pow(1 + iskonto/100, 3) >= investment ? (nakit1 / Math.pow(1 + iskonto/100, 1) >= investment ? 1 : nakit1 / Math.pow(1 + iskonto/100, 1) + nakit2 / Math.pow(1 + iskonto/100, 2) >= investment ? 2 : 3) : 99) : 0

suggestedActions: Verify inputs before making financial decisions.
Consult a licensed financial advisor for personalized advice.

description.short: Calculate the discounted payback period considering time value of money.
description.long: Calculate the discounted payback period considering time value of money.
